title: senecio breviflorus
intro: Senecio breviflorus is a plant species known for its medicinal properties and is commonly referred to as the "short-flowered ragwort". The plant is rich in bioactive compounds, including sesquiterpene lactones, which contribute to its medicinal value. Traditionally, Senecio breviflorus has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Senecio breviflorus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms associated with these conditions.
